summary: Iteration 15: Kids Zone Journey API and Frontend Testing. All 28 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified world map, stage activities, and IRS phases work correctly.

issues: Cookie consent popup appears at bottom of stage view - minor UX issue but doesn't block functionality

journey_endpoint.notes: GET /api/kids-zone/journey returns worlds array with stages, current_stage, total_xp, golden_bricks, mosque progress

stage_endpoint.notes: GET /api/kids-zone/stage/{stage_id} returns stage info with IRS activities (introduce/recognize/say phases)

complete_stage_endpoint.notes: POST /api/kids-zone/complete-stage returns xp_earned, bricks_earned, next_stage, mosque

progression.notes: After completing w1s1, current_stage becomes w1s2 and w1s2 is unlocked

world_types.notes: All 5 world types work: letters, harakat, reading, surah, tajweed, boss

world_map.notes: World map loads with stats (XP, bricks, streak), My Mosque section, 5 worlds visible

letters_world_expanded.notes: Letters world is expanded by default showing 8 stage nodes

first_stage_click.notes: Clicking on Alif Ba Ta Tha opens stage view with activities

introduce_phase.notes: Shows 4 letter cards (أ ب ت ث) with Arabic names, transliterations, example words, and audio buttons

irs_phases_visible.notes: All 3 IRS phase tabs visible: تعرّف (Introduce), اكتشف (Recognize), انطق (Say)

noor_mascot.notes: Noor mascot message 'Watch and listen! 👁️' visible

navigation.notes: Next button visible for navigation between phases

critical_code_review_comments: Firebase Analytics error in console (missing appId) - not blocking but should be fixed
Multiple consent popups (Location, Ad Consent, Cookie) appear on page load - consider consolidating or remembering user preferences
seed_data_creation: Test users created with prefix kid_test_pytest_* and kid_test_progression_*
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kids Zone Journey APIs are fully functional. The frontend uses localStorage to store kids_user_id. Popups (Location, Ad Consent, Cookie) need to be dismissed before testing. The Letters world is auto-expanded showing stage nodes. Stage w1s1 (Alif Ba Ta Tha) is the first unlocked stage for new users.
